description: A vertical graphic styled as a poster. A header in blue and red text reads SEATTLE, WA, WORST OF THE WORST. The center holds a booking-style photograph of a middle-aged man with dark hair against a faded prison-corridor background. Below, red and blue text reads FELONY ARREST, Convicted for assault, two convictions for receiving stolen property, with ARRESTED in large red letters and an ICE wordmark over a stylized Seattle skyline.
notable_text: SEATTLE, WA; WORST OF THE WORST; FELONY ARREST; Convicted for assault, two convictions for receiving stolen property; ARRESTED; ICE
